title: Yosys crashes while evaluating the Ackermann function
body:
While writing a [code golf stack exchange entry](https://codegolf.stackexchange.com/a/201472/62493), I found this amusing bug.

## Steps to reproduce the issue

With the following Verilog testbench as `ackermann.v`:

```verilog
module test();

function automatic[31:0]a;input[31:0]m,n;a=m?a(m-1,n?a(m,n-1):1):n+1;endfunction

initial begin
    $display("%d", a(3,10));
end

endmodule
```

run `yosys ackermann.v`.

## Expected behavior

Either Yosys evaluates the constant - 8189 - correctly, or else fails gracefully while evaluating it.

## Actual behavior

```
1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend: ackermann.v
Parsing Verilog input from `ackermann.v' to AST representation.
Generating RTLIL representation for module `\test'.
Segmentation fault (core dumped)
```

GDB shows that Yosys enters an infinite loop while evaluating it:
```
#7  0x00000000006911dd in Yosys::AST::AstNode::has_const_only_constructs (this=0xf5c500,
    recommend_const_eval=@0x7ffffffe9140: false) at frontends/ast/simplify.cc:3703
#8  0x00000000006911dd in Yosys::AST::AstNode::has_const_only_constructs (this=0xf55860,
    recommend_const_eval=@0x7ffffffe9140: false) at frontends/ast/simplify.cc:3703
#9  0x00000000006911dd in Yosys::AST::AstNode::has_const_only_constructs (this=0xf5c2a0,
    recommend_const_eval=@0x7ffffffe9140: false) at frontends/ast/simplify.cc:3703
#10 0x00000000006911c0 in Yosys::AST::AstNode::has_const_only_constructs (this=0xf5c8c0,
    recommend_const_eval=@0x7ffffffe9140: false) at frontends/ast/simplify.cc:3700
#11 0x00000000006911dd in Yosys::AST::AstNode::has_const_only_constructs (this=0xf5c500,
    recommend_const_eval=@0x7ffffffe9140: false) at frontends/ast/simplify.cc:3703
#12 0x00000000006911dd in Yosys::AST::AstNode::has_const_only_constructs (this=0xf55860,
    recommend_const_eval=@0x7ffffffe9140: false) at frontends/ast/simplify.cc:3703
#13 0x00000000006911dd in Yosys::AST::AstNode::has_const_only_constructs (this=0xf5c2a0,
    recommend_const_eval=@0x7ffffffe9140: false) at frontends/ast/simplify.cc:3703
#14 0x00000000006911c0 in Yosys::AST::AstNode::has_const_only_constructs (this=0xf5c8c0,
    recommend_const_eval=@0x7ffffffe9140: false) at frontends/ast/simplify.cc:3700
#15 0x00000000006911dd in Yosys::AST::AstNode::has_const_only_constructs (this=0xf5c500,
    recommend_const_eval=@0x7ffffffe9140: false) at frontends/ast/simplify.cc:3703
#16 0x00000000006911dd in Yosys::AST::AstNode::has_const_only_constructs (this=0xf55860,
    recommend_const_eval=@0x7ffffffe9140: false) at frontends/ast/simplify.cc:3703
#17 0x00000000006911dd in Yosys::AST::AstNode::has_const_only_constructs (this=0xf5c2a0,
    recommend_const_eval=@0x7ffffffe9140: false) at frontends/ast/simplify.cc:3703
#18 0x00000000006911c0 in Yosys::AST::AstNode::has_const_only_constructs (this=0xf5c8c0,
    recommend_const_eval=@0x7ffffffe9140: false) at frontends/ast/simplify.cc:3700
#19 0x00000000006911dd in Yosys::AST::AstNode::has_const_only_constructs (this=0xf5c500,
    recommend_const_eval=@0x7ffffffe9140: false) at frontends/ast/simplify.cc:3703
#20 0x00000000006911dd in Yosys::AST::AstNode::has_const_only_constructs (this=0xf55860,
    recommend_const_eval=@0x7ffffffe9140: false) at frontends/ast/simplify.cc:3703
```
and stack-overflows.
